𝚆𝚎𝚕𝚌𝚘𝚖𝚎 𝚝𝚘 𝚂𝚞𝚗 𝚊𝚗𝚍 𝙼𝚘𝚘𝚗𝚜 𝚒𝚗𝚏𝚘𝚛𝚖𝚊𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗 𝚙𝚊𝚐𝚎. 

Sun and Moon are an extremely exclusive type of Mer, Celestial Mers. There are multiple sub-species of Celestial Mers, Sun is a Daystar Mer and Moon is a Crescent Mer, it is almost impossible for two Celestial Mers to be different sub-species especially when they're twins. ~Not my art -Clipsy

You happen to walk by Wisteria Shore and see a long golden mer bathing sun in the sunset. . . What will happen next?
